overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a spaceship navigating through a dense asteroid field in deep space. The vessel approaches a massive derelict structure or wreckage amidst floating debris and a teal-green nebula backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field with distant wreckage

events.description: spaceship banks slightly left to navigate around asteroid cluster
ship adjusts trajectory right while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft through dense asteroid field, maneuvering between floating rocks while approaching distant structure

entered.detail: large dense cluster of gray rocky asteroids directly ahead
sparse field of small floating rocks on left side
sparse field of small floating rocks on right side
distant golden-yellow wreckage or station barely visible against nebula
teal-green gaseous nebula filling the space background with ambient glow

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies steadily through a vast asteroid field in deep space, with a teal nebula providing ambient lighting. The vessel maneuvers gently between floating rocks while a massive derelict structure looms faintly in the far distance.

events.description: derelict structure becomes clearly defined as golden wreckage with visible structural details

agents.ego_description: continuing approach toward the massive derelict structure, navigating through denser asteroid debris

changed.to: center_near large golden wreckage with visible girders and hull plates

segments.scene_description: The spaceship closes distance on the massive derelict structure, which resolves into detailed golden wreckage with exposed girders and hull fragments. The asteroid field remains dense as the vessel navigates toward the ruined station, with debris passing closely on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast asteroid field that gradually converges on a massive piece of derelict wreckage. It begins with the spaceship flying steadily through deep space, maneuvering gently between floating rocks under the ambient glow of a teal nebula. As the vessel pushes forward, the faint silhouette in the distance resolves into a detailed structure of golden wreckage characterized by exposed girders and hull fragments. The scene then intensifies as the spaceship closes the gap, navigating through a dense corridor of debris that passes closely on both sides before arriving at the ruined station.
